decisions.description: Check if the flow is running as test. If yes, assign 5 min delay
decisions.name: Run_in_test
decisions.label: Run in test

Flow.description: Sets Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab for PGT Supplements and PGT Genetic tests. This is then used as a 2 day delay when submitting the API call towards the lab

formulas.description: Adds number of days specified in Days to delay field of Automation Control Settings Custom Settings
formulas.name: date_AddDelayDays

formulas.description: Check if the new date after adding the delay is a business day. If not it adds necessary number of days to get the next business day
formulas.name: date_VerifiedDelayDate
formulas.expression: CASE( MOD( DATEVALUE({!date_AddDelayDays}) - DATE( 1900, 1, 7 ), 7 ), 0, {!date_AddDelayDays} + 1, /* Sun: $Flow.CurrentDateTime + 1 wknd day + 2 days */ 6, {!date_AddDelayDays} + 2, /* Sat: $Flow.CurrentDateTime + 2 wknd days + 2 days */ {!date_AddDelayDays} /* Default (Mon/Tue/Wed): $Flow.CurrentDateTime + 2 days */ )

Flow.label: Record Trigger - Lab Order - Set Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab field with the delayed date while making sure it returns a business day. To adjust the number of days to delay, change the value in the num_DaysToDelay constant
recordUpdates.name: Update_Date_to_be_Submitted_field
recordUpdates.label: Update Date to be Submitted field

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab field with a 5 min delay
recordUpdates.name: Update_Date_to_be_Submitted_field_test
recordUpdates.label: Update Date to be Submitted field test

start.filterFormula: OR( AND( ISNEW(), TEXT({!$Record.Services_Rendered__c}) = 'Precision Supplements' ), AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.Is_Kit_Registered__c}), {!$Record.Is_Kit_Registered__c} = TRUE, TEXT({!$Record.Services_Rendered__c}) = 'Precision Genetic Test' ) )
